description: Case Style: Analog watch with a platic case that has a stainless steel back, has fixed bezel Dial Style: Black dial with a tachymeter inside, branding on the dial, white coloured hour marks, white and steel coloured hands with a red coloured seconds hand Features: Screw to reset time Strap Style: Black plastic strap with a tang clasp, has holes to customise fit and texturing on either side of the dial for a stylish look Water resistant up to 10 BAR Warranty: 1 year
